data.title: Crypto market sees $230B disappear overnight, fear index drops to 28, investor sentiment turns bearish.
data.description: The market sentiment among investors shifted dramatically to pessimistic as the fear index for cryptocurrencies dropped to 28. A staggering $230 billion in market value disappeared within a 24-hour period.

data.title: France is auditing Binance & other exchanges as part of EU power struggle. ACPR seeks to enforce MiCA rules.
data.description: The French regulatory authority, ACPR, is conducting audits on Binance and several other exchanges, as part of Paris' efforts to strengthen enforcement of MiCA regulations throughout Europe.

data.title: Genco Shipping & Trading Limited to hold Q3 2025 conference call on Nov 6 at 8:30am ET, results out on Nov 5.
data.description: On October 17, 2025, Genco Shipping & Trading Limited (NYSE: GNK) revealed plans to conduct a conference call to review its third-quarter 2025 outcomes on November 6, 2025, at 8:30 a.m. Eastern Time. The event, featuring a live Internet broadcast and slide presentation, will disclose financial results for the quarter ending September 30, 2025, on November 5, 2025, post-market trading hours.

data.title: TransUnion launches new mortgage credit offerings, aiming to provide competitive, affordable, and inclusive options for American families.
data.description: A revolutionary method has been introduced to develop a credit scoring system that is accessible, cost-effective, and accommodating for countless American households. This innovative approach aims to enhance competition within the sector, benefiting millions of families across the nation.

data.title: Laminated Glass Market projected to reach $54.50 billion by 2030. Key report findings summarized.
data.description: On October 17, 2025, in Delray Beach, Florida, a report on the Laminated Glass Market was released. The report covers various glass types including Heat-strengthened, Tempered, Triple, Reflective, and others. It also analyzes the market based on different end-use industries like Automotive, Electronics, Building & Construction, Energy, and others across different regions globally. This comprehensive report provides insights and forecasts for the market trends, with key focus on industry segments and regional analysis.

data.title: Comerica's third quarter 2025 earnings released, details on website and Form 8-K filing.
data.description: Comerica Incorporated (NYSE: CMA) recently disclosed its financial results for the third quarter of 2025. The report can be accessed on the Investor Relations page of Comerica's website. Furthermore, the detailed financial outcomes will be submitted through a Form 8-K filing.

data.title: Bitcoin ETF ARK 21Shares sees largest outflows since August due to tariffs and $19B liquidation, says analysts.
data.description: Experts point to the impact of tariffs and a recent $19 billion liquidation event as the main reasons for institutional investors shifting towards defensive strategies.

data.title: SLB's Q3 2025 revenue hit $8.9B, up 4% QoQ but down 3% YoY. Pre-tax income slumped by 22% to $1B. Net income dropped 27% to $739M.
data.description: Houston-based SLB (NYSE: SLB) unveiled its third-quarter 2025 financial results. The revenue for the quarter was $8.928 billion, marking a 4% increase from the previous quarter but a 3% decrease compared to the same period last year. Income before taxes on a GAAP basis was reported at $1 billion, showing a 22% decrease from the previous quarter and a 34% decrease from the same period last year. The income before taxes margin on a GAAP basis was 11.2%, down by 383 basis points sequentially and 525 basis points year-on-year. Net income attributable to SLB on a GAAP basis was $739 million, down by 27% from the previous quarter.
SLB Q3 2025 Earnings - Rev. $8.93B (est $8.9B) - Adj EPS 69C (est 66C) - Adj. EBITDA $2.06B (est $2.07B) - Well Construction Rev. $2.91B (est $2.93B) - Capex $409M (est $503.5M)

data.title: Colossal's Toddler of the Year Campaign raises $12.7 million for Toys for Tots, 3-year-old winner receives $25,000.
data.description: In the 2025 Hollywood Christmas Parade, three-year-old Dominik "Domi" Gergely emerged victorious, bagging a $25,000 prize and garnering significant attention. The contest, organized by Colossal, the top professional fundraising entity in the country, has come to a close. This victory has marked Domi as the Toddler of the Year, propelling him into the limelight.

data.title: CrossAmerica Partners set to disclose Q3 2025 earnings on Nov 5.
data.description: In a recent report, it was revealed that the unemployment rate in the country has reached a concerning 10%, with approximately 15 million individuals currently out of work. This marks a significant increase from the previous year's rate of 6%. Additionally, the report highlighted that the economy shrank by 5% in the last quarter, resulting in a GDP of $20 trillion. The government has announced plans to allocate $50 billion towards creating jobs and stimulating economic growth in the coming months. The report also indicated that inflation has risen by 2.5%, impacting the cost of goods and services across the nation.Experts are warning that swift action is needed to address these economic challenges and prevent further damage to the country's financial stability.
